hero.eyebrow: Florida Top 1 Driving School · West Palm Beach & statewide
hero.title: Florida Driving Courses, Permit Prep & Bilingual Support
hero.subtitle: Florida Top 1 Driving School helps drivers and families choose the right course, prepare for the permit process, and get clear support in English or Spanish.
trust: Serving West Palm Beach & Florida statewide

problem.title: Getting a Florida license can feel confusing. We make the next step clear.
problem.body: Whether you are starting for the first time, helping your teen, handling a ticket, or looking for help in Spanish, we guide you toward the right option before you waste time on the wrong one.

cards.title: First-Time Drivers
cards.body: Know what course, permit prep, and steps you need before visiting the DMV.

cards.title: Parents of Teen Drivers
cards.body: Get a clear path for your teen's permit, practice, and license preparation.

cards.title: Spanish-Speaking Drivers
cards.body: Receive guidance in Spanish so you can move forward with confidence.

cards.title: Drivers With Tickets
cards.body: Understand your traffic school options and what steps may apply to your situation.

finder.heading: Not sure what you need? Start with the Course Finder.
finder.body: Answer a few quick questions and we'll recommend the best starting point based on your situation — first license, learner's permit, ticket, insurance discount, or Spanish-language help.

services.heading: Services We Help With
services.title: Choose the right support for your Florida driving situation.
services.subheading: Start with the Course Finder if you are not sure what you need, or explore the most common ways we help Florida drivers and families.

items.title: TLSAE / Drug & Alcohol Course
items.body: For first-time Florida drivers who need the required Traffic Law and Substance Abuse Education course.

items.title: Florida Permit Test Prep
items.body: Practice questions, study guidance, and preparation support before taking the Florida knowledge exam.

items.title: Teen Driver Support
items.body: Guidance for parents and teens navigating permit preparation, practice requirements, and next steps.

items.title: Spanish Driving Help
items.body: Spanish-language support for understanding requirements, courses, documents, and the next step.

items.title: Ticket Help Guidance
items.body: Educational support for drivers who need help understanding traffic school options after receiving a ticket.

items.title: Insurance Discount Course Guidance
items.body: Help identifying defensive driving options that may qualify for insurance-related benefits.

packages.heading: Recommended Starting Packages
packages.subheading: Simple starting points built around the most common situations Florida drivers face.

howItWorks.heading: Three steps to your clear next move
howItWorks.step1Body: Share whether you are a first-time driver, parent, ticket holder, or Spanish-speaking applicant.
howItWorks.step2Body: We explain what course, prep, or support option makes sense for your case.
howItWorks.step3Body: Start the right course or preparation path with guidance along the way.

whyUs.heading: Why drivers choose Florida Top 1 Driving School
whyUs.subheading: We focus on clear explanations, Florida-specific driving course guidance, and support for English and Spanish speakers.

cards.title: Florida-focused guidance
cards.body: We explain course and permit options based on common Florida driver situations.

cards.title: English and Spanish support
cards.body: Get help in the language you feel most comfortable using.

cards.title: Built for real situations
cards.body: First license, teen permit, ticket school, insurance discount options, or general course guidance.

cards.title: Simple next steps
cards.body: We help you understand where to start before spending time or money on the wrong option.

local.heading: Local guidance. Clear next steps. Support in your language.
local.body: Florida Top 1 Driving School serves drivers in West Palm Beach and across Florida with remote guidance, bilingual support, and simple explanations of the driving-course process. Our goal is to help you understand your options before you spend time or money on the wrong course.
points: Serving West Palm Beach and statewide
Built for first-time drivers, parents, and Spanish-speaking users
local.disclaimer: Courses may be delivered through approved third-party providers when required. Florida Top 1 Driving School provides guidance, preparation materials, and support to help users select the appropriate path.

testimonials.heading: Built for real Florida drivers and families
testimonials.subheading: Our support is designed for people who want simple answers, clear next steps, and help in the language they are most comfortable with.

items.quote: I wasn't sure if I needed the TLSAE course or permit prep first. They explained the process clearly and helped me choose the right starting point.
As a parent, I needed to know what my teen had to complete first. The guidance made the process much easier.
Me explicaron en español qué curso necesitaba y cuál era el próximo paso para prepararme para el permiso.

finalCta.heading: Ready to find the right driving course or support option?
finalCta.body: Start with a quick recommendation and get a clear path based on your situation.
